planted_red_flags.note: 2.1 — Provider can change pricing mid-term on 30 days' notice.
3.1 — Provider can terminate/suspend for convenience; Customer cannot.
4.1 — Provider trains models on Customer data, including post-termination.
5.1 — service provided AS IS with no warranties.
6.1 — 1-month liability cap that survives gross negligence and data breach.
7.1 — Customer indemnifies Provider; no IP-infringement indemnity back.
8.1 — governing law/forum in Singapore is impractical for a small US customer.
